docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $900.50 FILED BY RODGERS, ANDREW AS TO DEFENDANT NEWLIN, JOHN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-18-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JANUARY 17, 2017 AT 10:00. DEFENDANT'S CHALLENGE OF VENUE IS DENIED. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE.
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 8/31/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $40.00 SERVED SEP-23-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NEWLIN, JOHN
CHALLENGE OF VENUE FILED BY DEFENDANT NEWLIN, JOHN

THIS MATTER CAME ON CALENDAR FOR DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR VENUE CHALLENGE. THE MOTION FOR VENUE CHALLENGE IS DENIED. SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-18-2016 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JAN-17-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
